query: Magnificent 7 tech companies (Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla) large acquisitions $10 billion or more announced or rumored in 2026, especially mid-2026. Any pending big M&A deals as of June-July 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings on Magnificent 7 large acquisitions ($10B+) in 2026:

## Key Findings

**The one clear pending $10B+ Mag 7 deal in mid-2026: Amazon–Globalstar (~$11.6B)**
- Announced **April 14, 2026**; $90/share cash-or-stock (~23.5% premium)
- Amazon's **second-largest acquisition ever** (behind Whole Foods $13.7B)
- Boosts Amazon Leo satellite business (Direct-to-Device services) vs. Starlink
- **Apple angle:** Apple owns ~20% of Globalstar; Amazon assumes that stake and will power Apple's iPhone/Watch satellite services
- **Pending** shareholder/regulatory approval as of June–July 2026

**The largest 2026 Mag 7 deal (but closed early, not mid-year): Alphabet–Wiz ($32B)**
- Closed **March 11, 2026** — Alphabet's largest acquisition ever

**Not qualifying / context:**
- **Aligned Data Centers ($40B):** Microsoft and Nvidia are only *minority consortium investors* (BlackRock/GIP-led), not corporate acquirers
- **Meta–Manus (~$2B):** below threshold and **blocked by China** in April 2026
- No $10B+ standalone acquisitions from **Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla, or Meta** as acquirers in 2026
- Microsoft did **not** acquire OpenAI — that relationship was restructured (OpenAI became a $500B PBC; Microsoft holds equity, not ownership)

**Bottom line:** As of June–July 2026, **Amazon–Globalstar (~$11.6B)** is the sole pending $10B+ Magnificent 7 whole-company acquisition. No other Mag 7 firm has a pending or rumored $10B+ takeover at that time.

key_facts: Alphabet closed its $32 billion all-cash acquisition of cloud-security firm Wiz on March 11, 2026 — its largest acquisition ever (announced March 2025).
Amazon announced a definitive agreement to acquire satellite operator Globalstar for ~$11.6 billion ($90/share cash or stock) on April 14, 2026 — pending as of mid-2026.
The Amazon–Globalstar deal is Amazon's second-largest acquisition ever, behind the $13.7 billion Whole Foods purchase in 2017.
Apple owns ~20% of Globalstar; as part of the deal Amazon will assume Apple's stake and Amazon Leo will power satellite (Emergency SOS) services for iPhone/Apple Watch.
The Amazon–Globalstar deal followed an FCC ruling reaffirming Globalstar's exclusive Mobile Satellite Services rights in the Big LEO band; it remains subject to shareholder and regulatory approval.
Meta's ~$2 billion acquisition of AI-agent startup Manus (agreed late Dec 2025) was blocked by China's NDRC around April 28, 2026 and ordered unwound — below the $10B threshold.
Meta acquired humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence (ARI) in May 2026 for an undisclosed (small) sum.
A BlackRock/GIP-led consortium including Microsoft and Nvidia (minority investors) agreed to buy Aligned Data Centers for $40 billion (announced Oct 2025) — not a Mag 7 corporate takeover.
No standalone $10B+ whole-company acquisitions were announced by Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia, Tesla, or Meta as acquirers in 2026 as of early July.
The largest pending M&A deals in the market in 2026 are non-Mag 7: Netflix/Warner Bros. Discovery (~$83B), PIF-Silver Lake/Electronic Arts (~$55B), Charter/Cox (~$34.5B).

data_points.metric: Amazon acquisition of Globalstar (announced deal value)
Aligned Data Centers acquisition by consortium incl. Microsoft & Nvidia (minority)
